roomNotes.crashsite:
Vertical shaft, 20x60. Grey wreckage vibe.
Jutting platforms from both walls.
Top exit → Ship Interior (future)
Bottom → Forest Edge (future)
Quiet, eerie. No enemies.
First room after prologue.

mapNotes.text:
=== CRITICAL PATH ===
Ship Interior → Crash Exterior
→ Forest Edge (gentle, inviting)
→ Living Forest (main progression)
→ Native Ruins (gated by tool)
→ Bone Reef → Deep Ruins
→ Transformed Lands
→ Dragon's Sanctum

=== ITEM SEQUENCE ===
Ship Interior: nothing (injured)
Crash Exterior: EVE arrives
Wrackage: Knife + Scanner
Forest Edge: Grapple Gun
Living Forest: First Bio unlock
Native Ruins: Resonance Probe

=== ROOM SCALE GUIDE ===
Intimate/story: 20-25 x 15-20
Standard explore: 30-50 x 20-30
Grand vistas: 60-80 x 30-50 (rare)
Vertical shafts: 15-20 x 40-60

=== WORLD AREAS ===
(Stages of the Fall)
1. Wreckage (Shock) — HUB
2. Living Forest (Wonder)
3. Native Ruins (Humility)
4. Bone Reef (Struggle)
5. Deep Ruins (Truth)
6. Transformed Lands (Acceptance)
7. Dragon's Sanctum (Transcendence)

=== DESIGN RULES ===
Every room needs a reason:
• Teaches something
• Tests something
• Rewards exploration
• Advances story/mood
Nonlinear but NUDGE players.
Dark Souls 1 Firelink model.

=== FIRST 30 MINUTES ===
Ship Interior (wake up, injured)
→ Crash Exterior (EVE arrives)
→ Wreckage explore (knife found)
→ First creature (passive)
→ Suit sparking / hazard
→ Forest entry
→ Grapple found
→ THE SCREAM (Dragon)
→ First Adapted sighting
→ First shelter
